label: Required ritual and building
description: Pairs a precept and ritual pattern with a required building type. Memes use this to force inclusion of a specific building alongside a ritual.

precept.label: Precept
precept.description: PreceptDef for the ritual that this entry governs.

pattern.label: Pattern
pattern.description: RitualPatternDef that defines the ritual's behavior.

building.label: Building
building.description: ThingDef that must be present in the room for this ritual.
